title: Support  - Device with device connected
scenario: Device Support screen shows modal with device details and "Go" button when selecting a paired device from the list
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected to the phone.
3. On the Home screen, tap the Menu icon (hamburger menu).
5. On the Support screen, tap Device.
6. Observe the screen that appears showing a device image, the question "What device are you having issues with?", and a list of paired devices.
7. Tap on one of the listed paired devices.
8. Observe the modal that slides up from the bottom with a blurred background.
9. Verify the modal displays the following device details: Device name, Product ID, Serial Number, Software Version, HW Revision, and Last Connected.
10. Verify the modal includes a "Go" button and instructions to send the information to Support.
expected: A modal slides up from the bottom with a blurred background, displaying the selected device's details (Device name, Product ID, Serial Number, Software Version, HW Revision, Last Connected), a "Go" button, and instructions to send the information to Support.
